aboutPage.title: About Gungho
aboutPage.subtitle: Your trusted partner in creating unforgettable experiences and driving business growth through innovative event management and marketing solutions.
aboutPage.ourStoryParagraph1: Over the years, we have grown and evolved, expanding our services to meet the changing needs of modern businesses. Throughout this journey, our focus has remained consistent—strengthening our infrastructure and enhancing our in-house capabilities.
aboutPage.ourStoryParagraph2: We have continuously invested in capacity building, process optimization, and talent acquisition, enabling us to deliver high-quality, scalable, and result-driven marketing solutions to our clients.
whyChooseUsItems: Proven track record of successful events and campaigns
Customized solutions tailored to your needs
End-to-end service from concept to execution

values.missionDescription: To deliver exceptional event management and marketing solutions that exceed expectations and drive measurable results for our clients.
values.excellenceDescription: We are committed to maintaining the highest standards of quality and professionalism in every project we undertake.
values.clientFocusedDescription: Your success is our priority. We build lasting partnerships based on trust, transparency, and exceptional service delivery.
values.innovationDescription: We continuously evolve and embrace new technologies and strategies to keep our clients ahead of the curve.

services.corporateEventsDescription: Professional event planning and execution for conferences, seminars, and corporate gatherings.
services.teamBuildingDescription: Engaging activities designed to strengthen team bonds and improve collaboration.
services.socialEventsDescription: Memorable celebrations including weddings, parties, and special occasions.
services.productLaunchesDescription: Strategic event management for successful product introductions and brand activations.

marketingServicesPage.title: Gungho Marketing Services Pvt. Ltd.
marketingServicesPage.subtitle: We help brands grow, scale, and stand out with result-driven marketing solutions tailored to modern business needs.

brandVisibility.heading: 1. Brand Visibility
brandVisibility.lead: We enhance your brand presence across multiple touchpoints to ensure maximum impact:

items.title: In-shop Branding
items.description: Engaging retail displays and in-store branding to influence purchase decisions

items.title: Outshop Branding
items.description: Outdoor advertising and visual campaigns to boost brand recall

items.title: Office Space Branding
items.description: Creative workspace branding that reflects your brand identity

tradeActivation.heading: 2. Trade Activation & Marketing Initiatives
tradeActivation.body: We design and execute innovative trade marketing strategies that drive customer engagement and sales. Our initiatives focus on creating meaningful interactions between brands, retailers, and end consumers.

businessIncubation.heading: 3. Business Incubation & Marketing Services
businessIncubation.lead: We support businesses from idea to execution with strategic guidance:

items.title: Market Research
items.description: In-depth analysis to understand market trends, competition, and customer behavior

items.title: Go-To-Market Strategy
items.description: Structured planning to successfully launch and position your product or service

items.title: New Business Market Research
items.description: Identifying opportunities and validating business ideas for sustainable growth

mediaBuying.heading: 4. Media Buying & Media Planning
mediaBuying.lead: We optimize your marketing investments with data-driven media strategies:
bullets: Strategic media planning across digital and traditional platforms
Cost-effective media buying to maximize reach and ROI
Performance tracking and optimization for better results

integratedMarketing.heading: Integrated Marketing Services
integratedMarketing.lead: We provide end-to-end solutions to help brands attract, engage, and retain their audience:

marketingServices.heading: Marketing Services
marketingServices.lead: Strategic and creative marketing to build and grow your brand:

digitalMarketing.heading: Digital Marketing Services
digitalMarketing.body: Data-driven digital strategies to enhance your online presence and performance across platforms.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Gung Ho collects, uses, shares, and protects your personal information when you use our website and services.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.content: We may collect personal details such as your name, email address, phone number, and service requirements when you submit forms or contact us.

sections.heading: How We Use Information
sections.content: We use your information to respond to inquiries, provide requested services, improve our website experience, and communicate important updates.

sections.heading: Information Sharing
sections.content: We do not sell personal information. We may share data with trusted service providers who support website operations or service delivery under confidentiality obligations.

sections.heading: Data Security
sections.content: We implement reasonable technical and organizational safeguards to protect personal information from unauthorized access, disclosure, or misuse.

sections.heading: Your Rights
sections.content: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal information by contacting us at info@gungho.in.

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.intro: These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of the Gung Ho website and related services.

sections.heading: Use of Website
sections.content: You agree to use this website lawfully and not to engage in activity that disrupts website operations or violates applicable regulations.

sections.heading: Service Information
sections.content: All service descriptions on this website are for informational purposes and may be updated, modified, or discontinued without prior notice.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.content: Website content, including branding, text, graphics, and design elements, is owned by Gung Ho or used with permission and may not be copied without authorization.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Gung Ho is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from website use.

sections.heading: Governing Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by applicable laws in India. Disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of competent courts in New Delhi.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how Gung Ho uses cookies and similar technologies on this website.

sections.heading: What Are Cookies
sections.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device to help websites remember preferences and improve user experience.

sections.heading: How We Use Cookies
sections.content: We use cookies to support core site functionality, understand traffic patterns, and improve website performance.

sections.heading: Cookie Types
sections.content: Our website may use essential cookies for operation, analytics cookies for usage insights, and preference cookies to remember your settings.

sections.heading: Managing Cookies
sections.content: You can control or disable cookies through your browser settings. Disabling certain cookies may impact website functionality.

sections.heading: Policy Updates
sections.content: We may update this policy to reflect legal or operational changes. Continued use of the website indicates acceptance of updated terms.
